name: Absolent Air Care Group AB (publ)
summary: Absolent Group AB (publ) develops, manufactures, and sells filtration technology worldwide. It offers air cleaning equipment for maintaining clean air in aerospace, automotive, chemicals, commercial kitchens, food production, medical device manufacture, precision engineering, pharmaceutical, and wookworking industries. The company's products are used in machining, welding, forming/pressing, laser plasma cutting, heat treatment, food processing, quenching, die casting, and related applications. Absolent Group AB (publ) offers its products under the Absolent, AirMaid, Avani Environmental, Bristol, Filtermist Diversitech, Jeven, Bristol, Dustcheck, Kerstar, Infinity, Ecogate, and Tessu Systems brands. The company is headquartered in Lidk√É¬∂ping, Sweden. Absolent Group AB (publ) is a subsidiary of Mexab Industri AB.
